accept: act create --json output matches the spec shape exactly: ok, id, prefix, op_id, committed, pushed.
Decision documented for whether title and warnings are kept (additive) or dropped (strict-spec). Recommend additive with the spec fields plus title/warnings, since spec doesn't forbid extras.
Tests assert each documented field is present and typed correctly.
If shape changes, downstream MCP composed callers (act_next, act_finish) are updated and tested.
payload.title: act create JSON output shape diverges from spec
